3304730.name: Back To Back
3304730.description:
Set in Egypt, Back To Back, an exclusively co-op linear adventure where you follow the adventure of 3 pairs of characters through different time periods.

Story

After 1992's Cairo's earthquake, Restorations of pharaonic tombs have started. In one of the restorations, a pair of archaeologists reactivated a talisman dating back to 1570 B.C that will reshape modern day as we know it.

Theme

Inspired by Egyptian papyrus, 1990s comics and modern day indie games, the game will shift from one visual style to the other depending on the era of the current level. Making use of the Egyptian setting in environment and sound track choices.

KEY FEATURES

  • Work together to survive - Use teamwork to solve puzzles and overcome obstacles.

  • Experience various mechanics -  from How would you survive an apocalypse with only one gun to We have to time our jump together to avoid traps.

Note:

THIS PRODUCT IS CO-OP ONLY.
